name: El Shaddoll Meshachrer
effectText:
1 "Shaddoll" monster + 1 DARK monster + 1 EARTH monster
Must be Fusion Summoned. Unaffected by your opponent's activated Spell/Trap effects and the activated effects of your opponent's monsters whose original Levels/Ranks are lower than this card's Level. Once per turn: You can pay 800 LP; add 1 "Shaddoll" card or 1 "Void" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. If this card is sent to the GY: You can Special Summon 1 "Shaddoll" monster from your GY.
